prompt: We use GitHub Actions for CI/CD and want our Infisical secrets to automatically show up as GitHub repository secrets. We already have secrets in GitHub that we don't want to lose during the migration. How should I set this up?
assertions: Correctly states that GitHub does NOT support importing secrets (only overwrite-destination is available)
Recommends backing up or manually exporting existing GitHub secrets before syncing
Mentions repository scope option for GitHub sync destination
Recommends Key Schema or Disable Secret Deletion to protect manually-managed secrets
Warns that existing GitHub secrets not in Infisical may be overwritten
